title: ONS Labour Market Statistics Time Series
short_description: Monthly UK employment, unemployment, earnings and vacancy statistics including regional breakdowns.
long_description: The ONS Labour Market Statistics time series (dataset UNEM01) covers employment rates, unemployment rates, average weekly earnings, claimant count and vacancies for the UK and English regions including London. Monthly release with data back to the 1970s for some series. London-specific labour market indicators available. Published on the 3rd Tuesday of each month.
geographic_coverage: United Kingdom; English regions including London
schema_fields: cdid|string|Series identifier;title|string|Series description;date|date|Observation date;value|float|Statistical value;unit|string|Unit of measurement

title: ONS Consumer Price Inflation Time Series (MM23)
short_description: Monthly CPI, CPIH and RPI inflation indices and component series for the UK.
long_description: The ONS MM23 dataset contains all CPI, CPIH and RPI series including headline rates, component indices and special aggregates. Over 1,000 individual series. Includes housing costs (owner-occupier costs in CPIH), London cost of living indicators and detailed category breakdowns. Published monthly with a full history back to 1988 (CPI) and 1947 (RPI).

title: ONS Regional Gross Domestic Product — Local Authorities
short_description: Annual GDP estimates for all UK local authorities including all 32 London boroughs and the City of London.
long_description: ONS Regional Accounts GDP data providing annual gross value added (GVA) and GDP estimates at current prices and chained volume measures for all UK local authorities. Includes London boroughs broken down by sector (10 broad industry groups). The City of London consistently shows very high per-capita GVA due to its financial services concentration. Data from 1998.
schema_fields: la_code|string|Local authority code;la_name|string|Local authority name;year|integer|Reference year;gva_current_gbp_m|float|GVA at current prices £m;gdp_current_gbp_m|float|GDP at current prices £m

title: ONS Census 2021 Bulk Data Download
short_description: Complete 2021 Census microdata and aggregate tables for England and Wales at all geographic levels.
long_description: The 2021 Census bulk data download via Nomis provides all published census tables for England and Wales. Available at output area, LSOA, MSOA, local authority, region and national level. Covers population by age, sex, ethnicity, religion, country of birth, occupation, housing tenure, health, disability and travel to work. London-specific tables available with borough-level breakdowns across all topics.
record_count: Billions of cell values across 700+ tables
schema_fields: geography_code|string|ONS area code;geography_name|string|Area name;variable|string|Census variable description;count|integer|Population count;percentage|float|% of area population

title: ONS Business Demography UK
short_description: Annual births, deaths and survival rates of UK businesses by geography, industry and size band.
long_description: ONS Business Demography provides annual statistics on business births, deaths, survivals and active enterprises by local authority, industry (SIC 2007) and employment size band. Covers London boroughs individually. A key dataset for understanding entrepreneurship, business churn and economic dynamism. Part of the UK Business Counts series on Nomis.
record_count: Annual by ~400 local authorities and 500 SIC codes
schema_fields: area_code|string|Geographic area code;area_name|string|Area name;year|integer|Reference year;sic_section|string|Industry section;births|integer|New business registrations;deaths|integer|Business deregistrations;active|integer|Active enterprises

title: Companies House Free Company Data Product
short_description: Monthly bulk download of basic data for all 5+ million live and dissolved UK companies.
long_description: The Companies House Free Company Data Product provides a downloadable snapshot of basic company information for all companies on the UK register. Includes company name, registered address, company number, incorporation date, company type, status (active/dissolved), SIC codes and filing dates. Over 5 million companies across multiple CSV files. Updated monthly.
schema_fields: CompanyNumber|string|Unique company number;CompanyName|string|Registered company name;RegAddress.PostCode|string|Registered office postcode;CompanyStatus|string|Active/Dissolved/Liquidation;SICCode.SicText_1|string|Primary SIC activity description
sample_rows: 00000006|MARINE COAST LTD|CF14 3UZ|Active|41100 - Development of building projects

title: Companies House People with Significant Control (PSC) Data
short_description: Daily bulk download of beneficial ownership data for all UK companies — who owns and controls them.
long_description: The PSC dataset from Companies House contains all beneficial ownership declarations made by UK companies. Each record identifies a person or entity with significant control (over 25% shares, voting rights or right to appoint directors). Includes name, nationality, country of residence, nature of control and date notified. Critical for anti-money laundering, compliance and ownership transparency research.
schema_fields: company_number|string|Companies House number;name|string|PSC full name;nationality|string|Nationality;country_of_residence|string|Country of residence;nature_of_control|string|Basis of significant control
notes: Highly valuable for AML, fraud and ownership transparency use cases.

title: HMRC Tax Receipts and NIC Monthly Bulletin
short_description: Monthly UK tax receipt statistics covering all major taxes and National Insurance contributions.
long_description: HMRC publishes monthly tax receipts and National Insurance contribution data for all major UK taxes including Income Tax, Corporation Tax, VAT, Stamp Duty, Capital Gains, Inheritance Tax and NIC. Published on the 15th working day of each month. Time series from 1999. Essential for UK fiscal analysis and economic forecasting.
schema_fields: tax_type|string|Type of tax;month|date|Reporting month;receipts_gbp_m|float|Receipts in £ millions;cumulative_ytd|float|Year-to-date cumulative receipts

title: HMRC Quarterly Stamp Duty Land Tax Statistics
short_description: Quarterly Stamp Duty Land Tax receipts and residential/commercial transactions by geography and price band.
long_description: HMRC publishes quarterly SDLT statistics covering transactions and receipts for residential and non-residential property in England and Northern Ireland. Breakdowns by property value band, buyer type (first-time buyer, additional dwelling), local authority and parliamentary constituency. Strong London coverage given high transaction values. From 2004.
geographic_coverage: England and Northern Ireland; all London boroughs
schema_fields: quarter|date|Reporting quarter;local_authority|string|LA name;property_type|string|Residential/Non-residential;transactions|integer|Number of transactions;receipts_gbp_k|float|SDLT receipts in £000s

title: HMLR Price Paid Data
short_description: Every residential and commercial property transaction in England and Wales registered with HMLR since 1995.
long_description: The HM Land Registry Price Paid Dataset contains records of all property transactions completed in England and Wales and submitted to HMLR for registration since January 1995. Includes property address (with UPRN), price paid, transaction date, property type (detached/semi/terraced/flat), new build flag and freehold/leasehold status. Over 28 million records. Monthly updates.
schema_fields: transaction_id|string|Unique transaction identifier;price|integer|Sale price in GBP;date|date|Transfer date;postcode|string|Property postcode;property_type|string|D/S/T/F (Detached/Semi/Terraced/Flat)

title: HMLR UK House Price Index
short_description: Monthly house price indices for 441+ UK geographies from national down to London borough level.
long_description: The UK House Price Index (HPI) published jointly by HMLR and ONS provides monthly average prices and index values for residential properties. Available at UK, country, region, county and local authority level — including all 32 London boroughs and City of London. Breakdowns by property type (detached/flat), buyer type (first-time/former owner) and new/existing property. Data from January 1995.
schema_fields: area_name|string|Geographic area;date|date|Reference month;average_price|float|Average house price £;index|float|HPI index value (Jan 2015=100);monthly_change_pct|float|Month-on-month % change

title: HMLR INSPIRE Index Polygons
short_description: Spatial polygon data for all registered freehold and leasehold land in England and Wales.
long_description: INSPIRE Index Polygons from HM Land Registry show the extent of registered titles (freehold and leasehold) across England and Wales as GIS polygons. Useful for spatial analysis of property ownership, identifying unregistered land, and building application pipelines. Updated monthly. Must be used with OS base mapping for context.
schema_fields: inspire_id|string|INSPIRE dataset identifier;title_no|string|Land Registry title number;polygon_id|string|Polygon reference;tenure|string|Freehold or Leasehold

title: Insolvency Service Company Insolvency Statistics
short_description: Monthly statistics on UK company insolvencies by type, region and industry.
long_description: The Insolvency Service publishes monthly statistics on companies entering formal insolvency procedures in England and Wales, Scotland and Northern Ireland. Covers compulsory liquidations, creditors voluntary liquidations, administrations, company voluntary arrangements and receiverships. Regional breakdowns allow London analysis. Seasonally adjusted rates also published.

title: Charity Commission Register of Charities
short_description: Daily download of the complete register of 190,000+ charities in England and Wales with financial data.
long_description: The Charity Commission publishes a daily extract of the full Register of Charities in JSON and tab-delimited format. Contains charity name, registration number, registered address, objects, income and expenditure, trustee information, filing status and classification by area of operation and beneficiary. Over 190,000 active and recently removed charities. Strong London coverage.
provider: Charity Commission for England and Wales
schema_fields: regno|string|Charity registration number;name|string|Charity name;postcode|string|Registered address postcode;income|float|Latest reported income £;expenditure|float|Latest reported expenditure £

title: HMCTS Civil Justice Statistics Quarterly
short_description: Quarterly statistics on civil court workloads, case types, timeliness and outcomes in England and Wales.
long_description: Published by the Ministry of Justice, this dataset covers civil court cases in county courts and the High Court. Includes claims, judgments, warrants of control, repossessions and trials. Data includes volume by case type, geographic breakdown and timeliness metrics. Royal Courts of Justice statistics particularly relevant for London legal market analysis.
geographic_coverage: England and Wales; court centre level
schema_fields: quarter|date|Reference quarter;court_name|string|County court or division;claim_type|string|Money/Possession/Other;claims_issued|integer|Claims issued in period;default_judgments|integer|Default judgments entered
